title: European Union’s ESMA Orders Unlicensed Crypto Firms to Exit EU Market as MiCA Deadline Arrives
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

European Union’s ESMA Orders Unlicensed Crypto Firms to Exit EU Market as MiCA Deadline Arrives

ESMA ordered unlicensed crypto firms to stop serving EU clients and wind down operations before MiCA's July 1, 2026 authorization deadline.

This post European Union’s ESMA Orders Unlicensed Crypto Firms to Exit EU Market as MiCA Deadline Arrives first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: H100 Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Deal That Would Make It Europe’s No. 2 Listed Treasury
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

H100 Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Deal That Would Make It Europe’s No. 2 Listed Treasury

H100 shareholders approved a deal to acquire two Norwegian bitcoin treasury firms, a move that would boost the company's holdings to 3,500 BTC.

This post H100 Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Deal That Would Make It Europe’s No. 2 Listed Treasury first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: US Senate Passes Housing Bill With Four-Year Fed CBDC Ban
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

US Senate Passes Housing Bill With Four-Year Fed CBDC Ban

The U.S. Senate has passed a housing bill that includes a ban on a Federal Reserve-issued CBDC through 2030.

This post US Senate Passes Housing Bill With Four-Year Fed CBDC Ban first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Nakamoto Inc. (NAKA) Closes Last Healthcare Clinic, Completes Full Pivot to Bitcoin
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Nakamoto Inc. (NAKA) Closes Last Healthcare Clinic, Completes Full Pivot to Bitcoin

Nakamoto has completed its transformation into a pure-play Bitcoin company, shutting its final healthcare clinic and ending all remaining ties to its healthcare business.

This post Nakamoto Inc. (NAKA) Closes Last Healthcare Clinic, Completes Full Pivot to Bitcoin first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Bitcoin Suisse Secures MiCAR License, Launches European Expansion from Liechtenstein
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Suisse Secures MiCAR License, Launches European Expansion from Liechtenstein

Bitcoin Suisse secured a MiCAR license in Liechtenstein, enabling the crypto financial services firm to expand regulated operations across the European Union under a unified regulatory framework.

This post Bitcoin Suisse Secures MiCAR License, Launches European Expansion from Liechtenstein first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
